com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXSymbolContext

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXBaseApplicationContext, IXBaseCurrentContext, IXBaseSymbolContext, IXCurrentSymbolContext, IXLanguageProvider, IXPrintServiceProvider, IXSymbolLibraryProvider

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXSymbolContext
extends IXBaseApplicationContext, IXBaseSymbolContext, IXCurrentSymbolContext
    This object allows any IXPlugin to have access to a number of very useful objects in Symbol Application. IXSymbolContext object is passed in as a parameter to various methods on IXSymbolAction. An IXApplicationContext object can be useful for debugging as it allows plugins to write to the output window of the Capital Symbol application.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXBaseApplicationContext

        getApplicationRoot, getOutputWindow, getParentFrame, invokeAction, show

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXLanguageProvider

        getLanguageManager

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPrintServiceProvider

        getPrintServices

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXSymbolLibraryProvider

        getSymbolLibraries

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXCurrentSymbolContext

        getCurrentSymbol, getCurrentSymbolLibrary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXBaseCurrentContext

        getActiveLanguage, getCurrentUser, getSelectedObjects
